name: Souper Spiced Raisin-Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the breadmaker according to its instructions.
2. Mix all ingredients in the provided mixing bowl.
3. Place the mixture into the breadmaker and start the kneading cycle.
4. Allow the bread to rise until it doubles in size.
5. Once risen, place the bread on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Turn off the breadmaker and let the bread cool completely before slicing and serving.
